page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A toolkit for carrying out genetic association for multi-category phenotypes. implements multinomial and ordinal nassociation incorporating covariates, conditional analysis,nempirical and non-emperical priors and fine-mapping.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program that implements a wide range of multinomial analyses in a single fast package that is designed to be easy to use by users of standard genome-wide association study software.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program that implements a wide range of multinomial analyses in a single fast package that is designed to be easy to use by users of standard genome-wide association study software.
